name: tienda-naturista
description: Tienda Naturista con fondo dinámico WebGL

scripts.prepare: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('static/js', {recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('node_modules/three/build/three.module.js', 'static/js/three.module.js'); console.log('Three.js copiado exitosamente.')"
